zotero.abstractNote: We introduce RP1M, a large-scale motion dataset for piano playing with bi-manual dexterous robot hands. The dataset contains 1 million frames of high-quality motion data, captured from a human pianist using a motion capture system and retargeted to a pair of dexterous robot hands. We provide the dataset to facilitate research in dexterous manipulation, imitation learning, and music generation. We also provide a set of baseline models for motion retargeting and piano playing.
